completionGate.statement: Not achieved until this goal's work ships as a PR driven to mergeable via /yeet (bun run beep yeet: repair -> verify -> publish --pr -> monitor).
completionGate.grandfatheredNote: Reference precedent; not an execution target.

mission: Reduce quality feedback wall-clock time while preserving canonical repo quality guarantees.

priority.firstOptimizationTarget: GitHub pull request feedback wall-clock time
priority.localCanonicalCommands: preserve full proof and understandable failure output
priority.parityPolicy: CI and local commands may differ when tiered gates keep the all-up proof intact

nonGoals: source or workflow behavior changes during Phase 0
moving repo-operational quality ownership outside tooling
committing to symbol-level docgen selectivity before feasibility proof
nextAction: Use goals/repo-quality-throughput for active execution. Retain this packet as prior research evidence.
